title: SCARD
description: Returns the number of members in a set.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns the set cardinality (number of elements) of the set stored at `key`. ## Examples SADD myset "Hello" SADD myset "World" SCARD myset ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the cardinality (number of elements) of the set, or `0` if the key does not exist. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): The cardinality (number of elements) of the set, or 0 if the key does not exist.
intro: Returns the set cardinality (number of elements) of the set stored at `key`.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Returns the set cardinality (number of elements) of the set stored at `key`.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
SADD myset "Hello"
SADD myset "World"
SCARD myset

| Redis

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the cardinality (number of elements) of the set, or `0` if the key does not exist.

**RESP3:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): The cardinality (number of elements) of the set, or 0 if the key does not exist.
